description: [P0] Scaffold packages/inventory package (actions/components/index) wired into the monorepo build and TS project refs
[P0] Add inventory TypeScript interfaces in packages/types/src/interfaces/inventory.interfaces.ts for all new entities
[P0] Migration: create stock_locations (location_type CHECK, assigned_user_id, manager_user_id, is_default partial-unique per tenant, unique (tenant,name), is_active)

[P0] Migration: create product_inventory_settings (1:1 service_catalog; track_stock, is_serialized, is_kit, creates_asset_on_delivery, reorder_point/qty, average_cost+currency, default_location_id, preferred_vendor_id)
[P0] Migration: create vendors (vendor_name, contacts, payment_terms, account_number, is_active; unique (tenant,vendor_name))
[P0] Migration: backfill distinct service_catalog.vendor freeform → vendors rows; set product_inventory_settings.preferred_vendor_id; mark legacy text column deprecated
[P0] Migration: create stock_levels (PK tenant,service_id,location_id; quantity_on_hand, reserved_quantity, held_quantity, reorder_point override)

[P0] Migration: create stock_units (serial_number, mac_address, status CHECK 8 states, location/client/asset, allocated_so_line_id, warranty_expires_at/term, loan_due_at, unit_cost+currency, received/delivered_at, source_po_id; unique (tenant,service_id,serial), unique (tenant,mac) WHERE mac NOT NULL; indexes status/serial/mac/asset/client)

[P0] Migration: create stock_movements (append-only; movement_type CHECK 12 types, from/to location, unit_id, quantity, unit_cost+currency, cogs_cost, reason, source_doc_type/id, performed_by; no updated_at)
[P0] Migration: create purchase_orders + purchase_order_lines (status CHECK; is_drop_ship, drop_ship_client_id, drop_ship_address; line source_so_line_id, quantity_received)

[P0] Migration: create sales_orders + sales_order_lines (status CHECK; invoice_mode, allocation_mode, client_po_number; line fulfillment_type, parent_so_line_id, quantity_fulfilled, quantity_invoiced)
[P0] Migration: create kit_components (PK tenant,kit_service_id,component_service_id; quantity)
[P0] Migration: create stock_transfers + stock_transfer_lines (status CHECK dispatched/received/cancelled; dispatched/received by+at)
[P0] Migration: create rma_cases (rma_type, status CHECK 11 states, returned/replacement unit, vendor, rma_reference, dead_unit_due_date, dead_unit_returned_at, opened/closed_at)
[P0] Migration: add nullable assets.service_id (FK service_catalog) + assets.stock_unit_id (FK stock_units)
[P0] Migration: seed exactly one default stock_locations row per existing tenant
[P0] Migration: register permissions (inventory/vendor/purchase_order/sales_order/stock_transfer CRUD; stock_location read/update) and grant to admin role per tenant
[P0] Reversible down() for every inventory migration (drop in dependency order)
[P0] Movement primitive service: write a stock_movement and update stock_levels/unit-status atomically within withTransaction (single chokepoint all flows use)
[P0] Reconciliation utility: recompute stock_levels and serialized on-hand by replaying stock_movements (for repair + tests)
[P1] stock_locations: list action
[P1] stock_locations: create action enforcing single is_default per tenant
[P1] stock_locations: update action
[P1] stock_locations: deactivate action, guarded against deactivating a location that still holds stock
[P1] stock_locations: set manager_user_id (alert routing) and assigned_user_id (van/tech)
[P1] product_inventory_settings: enable inventory on a product (create row, track_stock=true)
[P1] product_inventory_settings: toggle is_serialized, guarded when units already exist
[P1] product_inventory_settings: toggle is_kit, guarded when product is referenced
[P1] product_inventory_settings: set reorder_point/qty, default_location, preferred_vendor, creates_asset_on_delivery
[P1] Surface product_inventory_settings merged into product read/detail (IService extension)
[P1] ProductsManager UI: per-product Inventory panel (flags + reorder/location/vendor fields)
[P1] Inventory nav section + /msp/inventory routing scaffolding (MSP-only)
[P1] Locations management screen (list/create/edit/deactivate, set manager/tech)
[P1] Guard: only item_kind='product' rows may receive product_inventory_settings (action-layer)
[P1] Guard: settings/cost currency aligns with product cost_currency
[P2] stock_levels: read on-hand/available for a product across all locations
[P2] stock_levels: read all stock at a location (location detail)
[P2] stock_units: create/list/get; search by serial_number
[P2] stock_units: search by mac_address
[P2] stock_units: detail view (status, location/client/asset, warranty, full movement history)
[P2] Manual receipt (no PO): non-serialized increments on_hand + writes receipt movement
[P2] Manual receipt (no PO): serialized creates units (serial+MAC+warranty) + per-unit receipt movements
[P2] Moving-average cost recompute on receipt for non-serialized products
[P2] Adjust flow (non-serialized): ± quantity with required reason + adjust movement
[P2] Adjust flow (serialized): loss→retired / found→in_stock with required reason
[P2] Retire/dispose flow (serialized unit→retired; non-serialized on_hand−)
[P2] Compute available = on_hand − reserved − held everywhere availability is shown/used
[P2] Serialized on_hand counts only in_stock units (excludes in_transit/on_loan/returned/in_rma/delivered/retired)
[P2] Movements ledger screen (filter by product/location/type/date/unit)
[P2] Enforce movement immutability (no update/delete actions exposed)
[P2] Negative/insufficient on_hand soft-warn payload surfaced to callers (warning, not block)
[P2] Enforce serial uniqueness (tenant,service_id,serial_number)
[P2] Enforce MAC uniqueness tenant-wide where mac_address NOT NULL
[P2] Per-unit movement history query (unit detail + advisory)
[P2] Fault/security advisory lookup: find units (in-stock + deployed) by serial/MAC list
[P3] vendors: list/get
[P3] vendors: create (unique name)
[P3] vendors: update
[P3] vendors: deactivate, guarded if referenced by open POs
[P3] purchase_orders: create draft (vendor, currency, ship_to_location)
[P3] purchase_order_lines: add/edit/remove (service_id, qty_ordered, unit_cost)
[P3] PO status transition draft→open (submit)
[P3] PO cancel, guarded if any line received
[P3] Receive against PO line (non-serialized): increment on_hand, qty_received, avg cost, receipt movement
[P3] Receive against PO line (serialized): create units (serial+MAC+warranty, source_po_id) + movements
[P3] Partial-receipt handling: PO status open→partially_received→received
[P3] Over-receipt allowed with warning
[P3] Purchase Orders list/detail screens
[P3] Receiving UI (per-line, serial/MAC/warranty capture)
[P3] Vendors management screen
[P3] Guard: PO currency vs product cost_currency
[P3] PO number generation (per-tenant unique sequence)
[P4] sales_orders: create draft (client, currency, ship_to, invoice_mode, allocation_mode, client_po_number)
[P4] sales_order_lines: add/edit/remove (service_id, qty, unit_price, tax_rate_id, fulfillment_type)
[P4] SO status transition draft→confirmed
[P4] On confirm soft allocation: serialized in_stock→allocated (+allocated_so_line_id); non-serialized reserved_quantity+=qty
[P4] On confirm hard-hold (allocation_mode=hard): held_quantity+=qty / units hard-held
[P4] Allocation reversal on SO edit/cancel (release reserved/held; units→in_stock)
[P4] Availability check at confirm: flag backordered qty = ordered − available
[P4] Fulfill SO line (from_stock): consume flow; qty_fulfilled+=; SO status partial/fulfilled
[P4] Consume (serialized): pick unit (selected serial/MAC or FIFO)→delivered, set client/delivered_at, clear location
[P4] Consume: capture COGS on movement (unit_cost serialized / average_cost non-serialized)
[P4] Consume: decrement on_hand, release reservation/hold for the consumed qty
[P4] Hard-hold poach guard: consume cannot take a unit/qty hard-held by another SO
[P4] Asset linkage on delivery: call assets createAsset (ABAC), set asset.service_id/stock_unit_id + unit.asset_id; carry serial/MAC/warranty
[P4] creates_asset_on_delivery gating (skip asset creation when false)
[P4] Materials hook: addTicketMaterial consumes stock for track_stock products (source_doc_type=ticket_material)
[P4] Materials hook: addProjectMaterial consumes stock (source_doc_type=project_material)
[P4] Serial/MAC picker in ticket/project material dialog for serialized products
[P4] Material delete (unbilled) writes compensating movement / reverts unit
[P4] Invoicing on-fulfillment: emit billable charge into existing invoice-generation engine on fulfill
[P4] Invoicing manual: 'Generate invoice' from selected SO lines on demand
[P4] quantity_invoiced shared ledger guard (≤ ordered; invoice_item↔so_line link; no double-bill across both paths)
[P4] Partial ship → partial invoice correctness (counters advance independently)
[P4] Sales Orders list/detail screens
[P4] SO create/edit UI (lines, allocation/invoice mode, fulfillment_type)
[P4] Backorder → suggested draft PO from SO line (source_so_line_id link)
[P4] Contract seam: recurring contract billing does NOT consume stock (no movement emitted)
[P4] SO cancel (release allocations; guard if fulfilled/invoiced)
[P4] Guard: SO currency vs line/product currency
[P5] Kit definition: kit_components CRUD (add/remove components + quantity)
[P5] Guard: a kit cannot contain a kit (single-level BOM)
[P5] Kit explosion on SO add: parent kit line + component lines (parent_so_line_id)
[P5] Exploded kit component lines decrement each component from stock on fulfill
[P5] Kit with non-stocked component (license/labor) rides on SO without stock decrement
[P5] Editing kit parent line qty scales component quantities
[P5] Kit management UI (component editor in product Inventory panel)
[P5] Kit pricing roll-up behavior defined (sum-of-components vs independent kit price)
[P6] Transfer dispatch: create stock_transfers (dispatched); transfer_out movements; source on_hand−; serialized units→in_transit
[P6] Transfer receive: →received; transfer_in movements; dest on_hand+; serialized units→in_stock at dest
[P6] Transfer cancel before receipt returns units/qty to source
[P6] In-transit stock excluded from destination available until received
[P6] Transfers UI (dispatch/receive, in-transit list)
[P6] Loaner out: loan_out movement; unit in_stock→on_loan; set client+loan_due_at; no COGS/no invoice
[P6] Loaner return: loan_in movement; on_loan→in_stock
[P6] Loaners-out report (where/since/due back)
[P6] Restock return: return_restock movement; on_hand+ (sellable); serialized delivered→in_stock
[P6] Restock return optional restocking fee + credit memo
[P6] RMA case create (standard): open, returned_unit, client, asset, reason
[P6] RMA standard: receive return (delivered→returned; return_defective movement; not sellable)
[P6] RMA standard: send to vendor (rma_out; →in_rma; vendor+rma_reference)
[P6] RMA standard resolve: replacement (rma_in new unit; replacement_unit_id; →replaced)
[P6] RMA standard resolve: repair (in_rma→in_stock) / credit (→retired,credited) / scrap (retired,closed)
[P6] RMA advance-replacement create (rma_type=advance_replacement)
[P6] RMA advance: replacement received (rma_in; new unit in_stock)→replacement_received
[P6] RMA advance: replacement deployed (ship to client; relink same asset; update serial/MAC)→replacement_deployed
[P6] RMA advance: dead_unit_owed with dead_unit_due_date clock
[P6] RMA advance: dead unit returned (return_defective→rma_out; dead_unit_returned_at)→closed
[P6] RMA advance: deadline missed → charged → closed
[P6] RMA case list/detail UI (standard + advance)
[P6] Dead-units-owed aging widget (sorted by days remaining)
[P6] RMA replacement updates linked asset serial/MAC + clears old unit asset_id
[P7] Low-stock detection (available ≤ per-location reorder override else product default) for track_stock products
[P7] Per-location alert routing to manager_user_id (no global firehose)
[P7] Low-stock dashboard widget (per location) + report
[P7] Create PO from low-stock (grouped by preferred_vendor; suggested qty)
[P7] Drop-ship: SO line fulfillment_type=drop_ship → PO is_drop_ship + drop_ship_client
[P7] Drop-ship: combined receipt+delivery creates delivered unit+asset+invoice with NO on_hand touch
[P7] Drop-ship serialized: capture serial/MAC/warranty at drop-ship confirm
[P7] Location-scoped write/adjust enforcement (tech→own van+home; manager/admin→all)
[P7] Permission checks on all inventory actions (inventory/vendor/po/so/transfer/location resources)
[P7] Stock side-effects from billing flows run under billing:create (no double-gate)
[P7] Inventory value report (Σ on_hand × cost) per location + total
[P7] Margin/COGS report (sell − COGS per sale/period)
[P7] Units screen: combined serial/MAC search + status/location/client filters
[P7] Stock screen: on-hand/available by product × location with low-stock highlight
[P7] Expiring-warranty report/widget
[P7] Open POs / open SOs dashboard widgets
[P7] Inventory dashboard composition (assemble widgets)
[P7] Optional: surface Xero IsTrackedAsInventory awareness alignment (read-only flag)
[P7] Extend product delete guard: block delete when stock_units/levels/movements exist
[P7] Material→stock idempotency (no double-decrement on retry)
[P7] Currency handling on SO invoicing (line currency flows to invoice)
[P7] Audit: performed_by stamped on every movement (and surfaced in ledger UI)
[P7] Client-portal guard: inventory surfaces are MSP-only (not exposed to client portal)
